zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Harling於1372年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林時，她的父親John de Herling26歲，母親Margaret Gyney22歲。她於1392年與John De Tudenham在英國諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1416年享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布盧易斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Harling于1372年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林时，她的父亲John de Herling26岁，母亲Margaret Gyney22岁。她于1392年与John De Tudenham在英国諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1416年享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可布盧易斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Harling in Norfolk. The placename means ‘(settlement of) the people of Herela’, from an Old English personal name Herela + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas.
North German: habitational name from any of several places so named, from a derivative of an ancient Germanic personal name with the first element hari, heri ‘army’.

variants.name: Harlin
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Middle English (H)erlin, (H)arlin, (H)erlwin, Old French Herluin, Arluin, (ancient Germanic Erlewin, Herlewin, composed of elements meaning ‘earl’ and ‘friend’). There is late Middle English loss of /w/ after /l/ in forms such as Urlin(g), Earling, Harlin(g).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Harling was born in 1372, in East Harling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Herling, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Gyney, was 22. She married John De Tudenham in 1392, in East Harling, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1416, at the age of 44, and was buried in Bruisyard, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Harling est née en 1372, à East Harling, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Herling, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gyney, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John De Tudenham en 1392, à East Harling, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1416, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Bruisyard, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Harlingが1372年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ハーリングで生まれた時，父John de Herlingは26歳，母Margaret Gyneyは22歳であった。1392年にイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ハーリングでJohn De Tudenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1416年に44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブルイシアルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Harling(이)가 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 하를링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Herling(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Gyney(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1392년 영국 노르폴크 이스트 하를링에서 John De Tudenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브루이시아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Harling родилась в 1372 г. в местности эаст харлинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Herling было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gyney, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Tudenham в 1392 г. в местности эаст харлинг, норфолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1416 г. в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности бруисярд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
